rulings.Case Title: YARNG ALTAWAL VS. YOEL SBERLO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Motion For Relief Under C.C.P. Section 473
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs YOEL SBERLO, NADINE SBERLO and URBAN PIONEER, INC.'s Motion For Relief Under C.C.P. Section 473 DENIED. Relief is not available. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that counsel's failure to properly notice the motion caused entry of judgement, dismissal or order, i.e. precludes the action from being addressed on the merits. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YARNG ALTAWAL VS. YOEL SBERLO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defenants Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or Alternatively Motion To Dismiss, Based On Collateral Estoppel And Res Judicata
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs YOEL SBERLO, NADINE SBERLO and URBAN PIONEER, INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or Alternatively Motion To Dismiss, Based On Collateral Estoppel And Res Judicata Hearing Required to address whether this action may proceed in light of the alleged re-opening of the bankruptcy proceeding and prior to any action by the Trustee. Motions for Judgment on the Pleadings are taken off calendar. Opposing party objected to insufficient notice and did not address the motion on the merits re: bankruptcy/collateral estoppel/res judicata. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NASER HILALY ET AL VS. BETTY ROSE ALLEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT BETTY ALLEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendants did not cite any authority for the proposition that all of the items listed on the Notice of Intent to Withdraw Form prepared by the Rent Board ("Form") are mandatory. Defendants also do not claim that the Form itself is mandatory and do not cite any provisions of the Government Code or SFRO that would mandate the inclusion of information requested in the format suggested by the Form. Defendants also do not cite any law for the proposition that a declaration becomes defective if it is signed by multiple declarants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NASER HILALY ET AL VS. BETTY ROSE ALLEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT BETTY ALLEN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving party failed to show that the matter subject to this motion is irrelevant, false, improper, or not drawn in conformity with the laws of this state. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX MALTEZ VS. ESTEBAN PINAL ACEVEDO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 21, 2017 line 9. DEFENDANTs ESTEBAN ACEVEDO and SYLVIA MELENDEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff's request for judicial notice is granted. Defendant did not file a request for judicial notice (even though such request is referenced in the Points and Authorities). Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
